title: LLM Pairwise Verification Response
description: Schema for the structured JSON output of the pairwise LLM verification node (Node 4).

decision.description: The equivalence decision for the keyword pair.

confidence.description: Model confidence in the decision (0.0 = lowest, 1.0 = highest).

justification.description: 1-2 sentence explanation of the decision using the scope-policy category vocabulary.
